title: Source
description: A bibliographic entry. Cited by Claim via the cites edge (YAML field source_ids on Claim, materialised to E_cites at graph build). Migrated from content/auckland/schema/source.schema.json; extended with geo_granularity for multi-region coverage annotation.

type.description: Source typology (source_typology_v1). Controls credibility floor in lint.

geo_granularity.description: Set of Region values this source covers spatially. Absent means coverage is unspecified or global. Used at graph-build time to flag scope mismatches between a Claim's scoped_to and its cited Sources.
